conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. It is determined that a mage is secretly keeping a demon soul stone. According to the Dalaran Violet Citadel Arcane Control Decree, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle a mage secretly keeping a demon soul stone</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:60010] Time: 2026-06-08-16:20, Content: Dalaran Violet Citadel Arcane Control Decree: If a temporal rift is detected within the city limits, forcibly freeze the time flow within a hundred yards; if an unregistered magical construct is found rampaging and causing injuries, cast Dispel Magic to forcibly disassemble it; if it is determined that a mage is secretly keeping a demon soul stone, then revoke their Kirin Tor membership and exile them; if arcane energy dissipation leads to a large-scale mana addiction outbreak, activate the ley line absorption matrix. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:60010] stipulates that if a mage is secretly keeping a demon soul stone, revoke their Kirin Tor membership and exile them.
conversations.content: According to the Arcane Control Decree, you must revoke their Kirin Tor membership and exile them!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
